title: AE2 Things
description: RS-like disks and some machines ported from AE2 Stuff
body: This mod adds two machines from AE2Stuff the Advanced Inscriber and Crystal Growth Chamber, and a new type of cell the DISK: Deep Item Storage disK. This cell has no type limits and one item counts as one byte. Due to limitations with the cell format, you lose 24 bytes per kibibyte, but hey a small price to pay for no types right?
